
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 5.5 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule Li2 with basis 6-31G and bond length 5.5 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.839999716423653 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.02451382805033004 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).


Running VQE optimization with SlowQuant using OVOS-optimized orbitals as reference...
OVOS optimized energy = -15.714672 Hartree @ iterations 66.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
UHF energy = -15.718772 Hartree @ iterations 21.

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
UMP2 natural orbitals are restricted (RHF-like).
UHF natural orbital energy = -15.727287 Hartree @ iterations 125.
